query:
INSERT INTO parcel_history
            (parcel_id, driver_id, latitude, longitude,
             timestamp, status)
        SELECT * FROM UNNEST(
            $1::text[],
            $2::text[],
            $3::float8[],
            $4::float8[],
            $5::bigint[],
            $6::text[]
        )
        ON CONFLICT (parcel_id, timestamp) DO NOTHING
